title: neoregelia olens
intro: Neoregelia olens, also known as the 'Ring of Fire' bromeliad, is a tropical plant species belonging to the pineapple family and characterized by its bright red, flaming flowers. The medicinal properties of Neoregelia olens include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Neoregelia olens can be prepared into herbal remedies through infusions, decoctions, or extracts, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
